financial_answer.brief_explanation: The percentage change from the highest to the lowest share price for the quarter ended March 31, 2015 was calculated by taking the difference between $101.88 and $93.21 (the high and low respectively), dividing it by the high ($101.88) and then multiplying by 100 to get a percentage.
